name: API Layer
description: FastAPI routers, request-scoped dependencies, and error translation that expose auth, checkout, voids, lots, products, staff, shops, dashboard, users, and health endpoints.

name: Service Layer
description: Core business logic modules that enforce checkout, voiding, end-of-day, low-stock, and invoice-PDF rules independently of HTTP concerns.

name: Data & Persistence Layer
description: SQLAlchemy ORM models, the async DB engine/session bootstrap, and the Alembic migration chain that together define and evolve the Postgres schema for shops, users, products, lots, invoices, and audit logs.

name: Schemas & Types
description: Pydantic request/response schemas that validate and serialize data crossing the API boundary for auth, products, lots, checkout, EOD, and shop endpoints.

name: Security
description: JWT issuance/verification and bcrypt password hashing helpers used to authenticate users and protect credentials across the API.

name: Application Core & Bootstrap
description: The app factory, CLI provisioning tool, environment-driven settings, and structured logging setup that wire the FastAPI application together.

name: Test Suite
description: Pytest integration tests (with shared fixtures) mirroring the app package, covering auth, RBAC, checkout, voids, EOD, staff, products, low-stock, and health endpoints.

name: Infrastructure & Project Config
description: Local Postgres containerization, Alembic tooling config, environment variable template, and the Python project manifest that support running and building the system.

name: Documentation & Planning
description: Project README, the harness planning trail (intake, branch map, decision ledger, PRDs, absence hunt), and the early frontend design mockups that predate the real frontend app.
